name: sr_analytical_routing_stopped_ordering
notes: VT-595 regression (Done): an analytical win-back-adjacent question, phrased differently from the repo's canonical wording, must still NOT mis-route to the status_query raw-count fast-path (edge_case:status_query) — it must engage real analysis/delegation. assert_run_reason_not is deliberately not used (VT-598 found no pipeline column carries DispatchResult.reason for this fast-path branch), so assert_not_contains against the raw-count signature phrase is the working proxy, matching the repo's delegation_analytical_routing.json precedent. Run: `setup --onboarded --seed-lapsed-customers 9 --name convo-harness-<id>` then `script <tenant> sr_analytical_routing_stopped_ordering.json`.

steps.message: there are a bunch of regulars who used to order every week and just disappeared — can you tell me what's going on with them?
steps.note: Analytical/diagnostic ask about a customer segment — must engage real analysis or delegation, never the bare status_query raw-count signature reply, never D1.

steps.message: ok and just to confirm, how many customers do I have total?
steps.note: The genuine pure count ask still fast-paths to the raw number — the contrast with step 1 is the point of the scenario.
